title: Fringe Academy Everything You Need To Know About The Box Office
description: Join the Brighton Fringe Box Office Manager, Elin Eaton, to find out everything you need to know about managing the box office for your event. Covering everything from how to access ticket sales, to making change requests and cancelling event dates. Elin will be able to answer all your queries before your Brighton Fringe dates begin. There will be a presentation to begin with, followed by a chance to ask any questions you may have regarding box office. Join Here: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/7800653204?omn=85920504769
